prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young East Asian woman standing alone in a vast wildflower meadow. She is centered in the frame, facing the camera directly with a calm, introspective expression. She wears a traditional Korean hanbok in muted charcoal gray and soft blue tones, with natural fabric texture and subtle folds. Her dark hair is loosely tied back with a few strands gently blown across her face by the wind. She holds a small hand-picked bouquet of wildflowers—white daisies, blue cornflowers, and dry grass stems—clasped softly in both hands at waist level. The meadow is filled with colorful wildflowers (reds, whites, blues, purples) stretching into the distance. In the background, a large mist-covered mountain rises softly out of focus, partially obscured by low clouds and fog, creating a moody, atmospheric depth. Overcast sky with soft diffused natural light, cool color palette, muted contrast, cinematic realism. Shallow depth of field, sharp focus on subject, creamy background bokeh. Natural skin texture, realistic facial details, no makeup look. Fine art photography style, emotional, poetic, timeless. Shot on a full-frame camera, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ultra-high resolution, photorealistic, no text, no watermark.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young East Asian woman standing alone in a vast wildflower meadow. She is centered in the frame, facing the camera directly with a calm, introspective expression. She wears a traditional Korean hanbok in muted charcoal gray and soft blue tones, with natural fabric texture and subtle folds. Her dark hair is loosely tied back with a few strands gently blown across her face by the wind. She holds a small hand-picked bouquet of wildflowers—white daisies, blue cornflowers, and dry grass stems—clasped softly in both hands at waist level. The meadow is filled with colorful wildflowers (reds, whites, blues, purples) stretching into the distance. In the background, a large mist-covered mountain rises softly out of focus, partially obscured by low clouds and fog, creating a moody, atmospheric depth. Overcast sky with soft diffused natural light, cool color palette, muted contrast, cinematic realism. Shallow depth of field, sharp focus on subject, creamy background bokeh. Shot on a full-frame camera, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ultra-high resolution, photorealistic, no text, no watermark.
promptZh: 超写实的电影感肖像，主角为一位 年轻东亚女性，独自站在 广阔的野花草甸 中。她位于画面中心，直视镜头，表情平静而内省。她身着 传统韩国韩服，色调为柔和的炭灰色与淡蓝色，呈现出自然的织物纹理与细微褶皱。深色长发随意束在脑后，几缕发丝被风轻轻吹过脸庞。她双手轻握着一束亲手采摘的野花——包括白雏菊、蓝矢车菊和干草茎——置于腰间。草甸上开满了色彩斑斓的野花（红色、白色、蓝色、紫色），一直延伸至远方。背景中，一座巨大的山峰在薄雾笼罩下若隐若现，部分被低云和雾气遮蔽，营造出忧郁且富有氛围的深度感。阴天，柔和的漫射自然光，冷色调，低对比度，电影级写实感。浅景深，主体对焦清晰，背景呈现奶油般的虚化效果。自然的皮肤纹理，写实的脸部细节，裸妆感。艺术摄影风格，富有情感、诗意且永恒。使用全画幅相机拍摄，85mm 镜头，f/1.8 光圈，超高分辨率，照片级真实感，无文字，无水印。
